picks.title: National Poetry Month: Rap as Storytelling
picks.why: Learn how rap tells stories with a performing arts educator—creative, engaging, and perfectly timed for spring break.

picks.title: 2026 Latinx Art Now! Exhibition  Auction
picks.why: Free all-day exhibition celebrating contemporary Latinx art from the Bay Area—culturally rich and perfect for spring break exploration.

picks.title: ICYMI Movie: Spring Break Edition
picks.why: Free spring break movie screening of The Princess Bride at Palo Alto library—timeless family fun, no ticket required.

picks.title: Craft Club for Adults: The Joy of Drawing - Tulips in Spring
picks.why: Spring-themed adult and family craft workshop celebrating tulips—seasonal, creative, and free at Saratoga Library.

picks.title: Pelicans, Herons, and Egrets, Oh My!
picks.why: Wildlife photography journey discovering elegant wading birds—educational nature presentation perfect for curious spring break learners.
